scenario.name: Simple Register
scenario.send: REGISTER sip:[field1] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Route: <sip:[field1];lr> From: <sip:[field0]@[field1]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[field0]@[field1]> Call-ID: [call_id] P-Visited-Network-ID: ims.mnc011.mcc460.3gppnetwork.org CSeq: 1 REGISTER Max-Forwards: 70 Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> User-Agent: SIPp IMS Client Expires: 3600 Content-Length: 0
